case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JAMES VARGAS BELDA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED AUG-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BELDA, JAMES VARGAS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST S PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES VARGAS BELDA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BELDA, JAMES VARGAS $2,143.49 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,243.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,143.49 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BELDA, JAMES VARGAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
